summary: Fixed CB-001 (high) by extracting two pure helpers — _resolve_active_config_path() and _pipeline_cache_key() — and routing _run_query() through them so the wizard-generated proj.photon_config_path takes priority over proj.config_path (mirroring the rule already enforced by _launch_eval_job at app/photon_app.py:964). The pipeline cache key now embeds the resolved config path, so swapping configs invalidates any previously-cached pipeline. Added 7 unit tests covering helper resolution, cache-key uniqueness, end-to-end load_config dispatch, baseline fallback, and cache invalidation on path change. All 122 photon_app tests pass; ruff check / ruff format clean.
